data.name: My Hot Goth Roommate Became My Goonmate
data.detailed_description:
A few days after accidentally catching your 256cm tall yandere, goth roommate watching BDSM on her phone, you kneel down before her and confess that you're a giant masochist that wants to be punished by her. Any normal woman would be grossed out, but fortunately for you, your gamble paid off, and your giant, goth roommate is a dom that's always wanted a submissive BDSM partner. And just like that, your hot goth roommate became your goonmate. As the two of you seem to be the perfect match for each other, and perhaps as time goes on, you can become more than just perverted gooners together.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: You confess your masochistic feelings to your giant, hot, goth roommate, who you recently caught watching BDSM porn on her phone, and beg her to dominate you.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
